This plant is native to the Himalayas and is characterized by its distinctive dragon-like inflorescence. The classification of Thamnocalamus dracocephalus is further supported by its unique morphological features and genetic analysis. As a member of the Poaceae family, it shares characteristics with other grasses and bamboo species.
